g.text: NCU validation of the FP16 Tensor treatment-control boundary

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #667784

g.text: Accepted NCU evidence must show Tensor work in reg_mma, no HMMA in the operand control, and zero spill. Overlapping FLOP/HMMA curves indicate proportional counter accounting; none of these counters directly measures silicon energy.
